name: Vistra Corp.
content: Vistra Corp. is a leading Fortune 500 integrated retail electricity and power generation company based in Irving, Texas. It operates a diverse portfolio of generation assets, including natural gas, nuclear, coal, solar, and battery energy storage facilities. Vistra is one of the largest competitive power generators in the United States and a major retail electricity provider, serving millions of residential, commercial, and industrial customers across multiple states. The company is increasingly focused on the energy transition through its Vistra Zero portfolio, which emphasizes zero-carbon generation and sustainable energy solutions.
